infrastructure_stack: Docker Compose (NestJS, Python Worker, React), LocalStack (SQS, SNS, S3, SES, Secrets Manager), Postgres Container (with pgvector)
service_dependencies: All services mocked locally; Wise/Stripe APIs mocked via WireMock or simple JSON responses.

infrastructure_stack: GitHub Actions Runners, Service Containers (Postgres, LocalStack)
service_dependencies: Full mock of external services; Internal services run as ephemeral containers.

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Staging Cluster), RDS (Multi-AZ), S3, Elasticache (Redis). Exact mirror of Prod architecture.
service_dependencies: Stripe Sandbox, Wise Sandbox, OpenAI API (Test Key).
access_control: Developers (Read/Write via VPN/SSO), QA, Product Owner
cost_optimization: Spot Instances for Node Groups, RDS paused off-hours if possible

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Scaled Up Staging or Ephemeral Cluster), High-Spec RDS (to test Vector Search)
service_dependencies: All External APIs Mocked (to avoid rate limits and costs). Internal services at production parity.
monitoring_tools: K6 Cloud, CloudWatch Insights, Container Insights

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Prod Cluster), RDS (Multi-AZ + Read Replicas), S3 (Versioning enabled), CloudFront, WAF
service_dependencies: Stripe Live, Wise Live, OpenAI Live.
access_control: Strict RBAC (Least Privilege), No SSH access, Break-glass mechanism for Admins
cost_optimization: Savings Plans, Reserved Instances, Auto-scaling policies
